name: ROI & NPV Calculator
description: Industrial-grade financial evaluation tool for capital investments, incorporating lean and six sigma principles, ISO standards, and WERC metrics.

inputs.label: Initial Investment
inputs.businessContext: Total upfront capital expenditure including equipment, installation, and training costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total upfront capital expenditure including equipment, installation, and training costs.

inputs.label: Annual Cash Inflow
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual net cash inflow from the investment (revenue increase or cost savings).

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual net cash inflow from the investment (revenue increase or cost savings).

inputs.label: Annual Cash Outflow
inputs.businessContext: Annual operating and maintenance costs associated with the investment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual operating and maintenance costs associated with the investment.

inputs.label: Discount Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) or required rate of return per ISO 15663.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) or required rate of return per ISO 15663.

inputs.label: Project Life (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Expected useful life of the investment per ISO 15686.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected useful life of the investment per ISO 15686.

inputs.label: Salvage Value
inputs.businessContext: Estimated residual value at end of project life.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated residual value at end of project life.

inputs.label: Inflation Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual inflation rate for adjusting future cash flows.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual inflation rate for adjusting future cash flows.

inputs.label: Tax Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Effective corporate tax rate for after-tax cash flow calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Effective corporate tax rate for after-tax cash flow calculations.

inputs.label: Risk Adjustment Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier to discount rate for project risk (1.0 = baseline).

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier to discount rate for project risk (1.0 = baseline).

inputs.label: Lean Six Sigma Annual Savings
inputs.businessContext: Additional annual savings from Lean/Six Sigma improvements (DMAIC).

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional annual savings from Lean/Six Sigma improvements (DMAIC).

inputs.label: WERC Throughput (units/year)
inputs.businessContext: Annual throughput per WERC warehouse metrics.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual throughput per WERC warehouse metrics.

inputs.label: Quality Defect Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Defect rate per Six Sigma DPMO target (default 1.5% = 4 sigma).

businessContext_i18n.en: Defect rate per Six Sigma DPMO target (default 1.5% = 4 sigma).

rules.message: Initial investment must be greater than zero.
Discount rate must be between 0% and 100%.
Project life must be at least 1 year.
Tax rate must be between 0% and 100%.
Risk adjustment factor must be between 0.5 and 2.0.
Defect rate must be between 0% and 100%.

thresholds.alert: Net Present Value is negative. Investment may not be viable.
Return on Investment is below 10%. Consider alternative investments.
Defect rate exceeds Six Sigma target (3.4 DPMO). Process improvement recommended.
Payback period exceeds project life. Investment may not recover costs.
Energy cost per unit exceeds $0.10. Consider energy efficiency improvements (ISO 50001).

formulas.name: Annual Net Cash Flow
formulas.description: Net cash flow after tax, depreciation, and Lean Six Sigma savings.

formulas.name: Annual Depreciation Expense
formulas.formula: if(depreciation_method == 'straight_line', (initial_investment - salvage_value) / project_life_years, if(depreciation_method == 'double_declining', (initial_investment - accumulated_depreciation) * (2 / project_life_years), if(depreciation_method == 'sum_of_years_digits', (initial_investment - salvage_value) * (remaining_life / sum_of_years), 0)))

formulas.name: Net Present Value (NPV)
formulas.description: Sum of discounted cash flows minus initial investment.

formulas.name: Payback Period
formulas.description: Time to recover initial investment from net cash flows.

formulas.name: Internal Rate of Return (IRR)
formulas.description: Discount rate that makes NPV zero (approximated via Newton-Raphson).

formulas.name: Six Sigma DPMO
formulas.description: Defects per million opportunities based on defect rate.

primary.label: Net Present Value (NPV)
primary.description: Primary financial metric indicating investment viability.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Quality Defect Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Annual cost of defects based on defect rate and throughput.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Energy Waste
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Excess energy cost due to inefficiency (ISO 50001).

suggestedActions.label: Reduce Defect Rate
suggestedActions.description: Implement Six Sigma DMAIC to reduce defect rate below 3.4 DPMO.
suggestedActions.impact: Potential savings of $X based on defect cost.

suggestedActions.label: Improve Energy Efficiency
suggestedActions.description: Conduct ISO 50001 energy audit to reduce energy cost per unit.
suggestedActions.impact: Potential savings of $Y based on energy waste.

suggestedActions.label: Implement Lean Practices
suggestedActions.description: Adopt 5S, Kaizen, and Value Stream Mapping to reduce waste.
suggestedActions.impact: Potential savings of $Z based on lean waste.

suggestedActions.label: Review Discount Rate
suggestedActions.description: If NPV is negative, consider lowering risk adjustment or WACC.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted NPV
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: NPV adjusted for data quality and uncertainty (Monte Carlo simulation).
